name: descriptor-driven-i32-binary-dispatch-route-manifest
title: Descriptor-driven i32 binary dispatch route manifest
description: Make RVV+scalar i32 add/sub/mul dispatch route, ABI, artifact-kind, and self-check metadata descriptor-driven from the existing i32 binary family registry plus dispatch-specific stable fields.
creator: codex
notes: Completed from dirty failed-round continuation. Manifest-backed RVV+scalar i32 add/sub/mul dispatch route API now drives target exporter registration and tcrv-translate direct route registration; direct source/header/object/self-check routes reject stale-family mismatches. Validation included task context validation, git diff --check, CMake configure with /usr/lib/llvm-20, focused C++ tests, focused RVVScalarDispatch and bundle/export lit tests, rvv_scalar_dispatch_e2e self-test plus add/sub/mul source and bundle dry-runs, and full check-tianchenrv.
